summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Talent Development & Program professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can strengthen capability, performance, and the people experience—through human-centered, data-driven programs.

bullets.text: Collaborate with 4 teams and 8 vendors to launch and {coord|manage 15+ programs}; drive continuous improvement via {data|feedback analysis}
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global {cross|stakeholders} to identify capability gaps and design 3 new {prog|learning programs}
Develop guides and workflows for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, improving knowledge and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, enhancing {prog|program understanding} and a 78% enrollment rate
Led a {prog|manager effectiveness} initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed development strategy
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|employee experiences} to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on engagement and L&D
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery interviews to diagnose absenteeism, then {data|analyze} 300+ leave cases—surfacing $362K in costs driving policy redesigns
Conduct focus groups and 1:1 interviews with an NGO leadership team to diagnose decision-making and {cross|accountability} gaps
Initiated a {prog|DEI} pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Supported HRBP team in HR solutions across {ex|employee relations}, headcount, and succession planning, partnering with leaders
Facilitated organizational change by directing a Mergers & Acquisitions project, overseeing {cross|cross-functional stakeholders}
Optimized {coord|onboarding} across 3 global locations via process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated C-suite panels at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
